overall.description: A cinematic first-person exploration of a cyberpunk street food stall at night in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera slowly circles around a cooking station where a vendor is preparing food with steam rising from a wok, while neon signs illuminate the background. The scene transitions to reveal a customer waiting at the counter.

agents.ego_description: slowly moving around the food stall counter observing the cooking process

notable_agents.action: vendor cooking with wok, tossing ingredients and creating steam

entered.detail: wok setup with active steam and cooking flames
mounds of noodles or fried food on the counter
metal exhaust hood over the cooking area
glowing neon signs with Asian characters visible through the stall opening
metal food preparation counter with utensils

segments.scene_description: The camera explores a cyberpunk street food stall from behind the counter, focusing on a vendor cooking with a steaming wok. Piles of noodles sit on the counter while neon signs glow in the background.

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions to the customer side of the stall, revealing a person with red hair sitting at the counter. The vendor continues cooking in the background while neon-lit street views become visible beyond the stall.

segments.scene_description: The camera settles near the customer who is looking at a device, with the vendor visible in the background continuing to cook. The view opens up to show the neon-lit cyberpunk street beyond the stall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from the frantic energy of a cooking station to a quiet moment of anticipation at a neon-lit street stall. It begins behind the counter, focusing on a vendor tossing food in a steaming wok beside piles of noodles under the glow of vibrant signs. As the camera glides around the stall, the perspective transitions to the customer side, revealing a red-haired individual waiting at the counter while the vendor continues to work in the background. The scene then expands to encompass the wider environment, shifting focus toward the customer looking at a handheld device. Finally, the view opens up completely to reveal the sprawling, neon-lit cyberpunk street stretching out beyond the stall.
